description: Schema for tasks.json in any registered project

task_id.description: Unique ID scoped to project, e.g. dmrb-001

status.description: Worker sets to 'complete' on success, 'blocked' on failure

action_type.description: Determines which handler executes this task

action_payload.description: Handler-specific inputs — shape depends on action_type

correlation_id.description: Optional UUID grouping all tasks from one planning session
